title: Asbury Stock Is Down 17%. One Fund Just Increased Its Bet by Millions
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: GoodHaven Capital Management increased its position in Asbury Automotive Group by $3.81 million despite the stock falling 17% year-to-date. The fund's confidence appears based on Asbury's solid Q1 2026 results, including strong used vehicle margins and aggressive shareholder returns, suggesting the weakness may be cyclical rather than fundamental.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite a 17% stock decline, institutional investor GoodHaven Capital increased its position significantly, signaling confidence. Q1 results showed resilience with used vehicle margins up 16%, strong liquidity ($1.2B), and aggressive capital returns ($147M in buybacks). Management is executing strategic initiatives (Tekion technology rollout, margin focus) that could stabilize the business as demand normalizes.

title: Asbury Automotive Accelerates Expansion With $1.34 Billion Herb Chambers Takeover
author: Lekha Gupta
description: Asbury Automotive Group (ABG) is acquiring The Herb Chambers Companies for $1.34 billion, adding 33 dealerships and $2.9 billion in revenue. The deal is expected to close in late Q2 2025 and will be funded through credit, mortgage, and cash.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Asbury Automotive's strategic acquisition of Herb Chambers, which is expected to significantly expand the company's operations and revenue. This suggests a positive outlook for the company's growth and future performance.
The article mentions that investors can gain exposure to Asbury Automotive through this ETF, but does not provide any specific commentary on the ETF's performance or outlook.

title: CDK Cyberattack Throws Auto Retailers Into Operational Chaos
author: Rimmi Singhi
description: CDK cyberattack results in operational chaos in the auto retail industry, forcing dealerships into manual mode and sparking industry-wide cybersecurity reassessments.

title: Penske (PAG) Down 3.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Penske (PAG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

title: Asbury Automotive: Strength In Maintenance Can Lift Shares
author: Seeking Profits
description: Asbury Automotive is increasing run-rate earnings while enjoying a still-favorable margin environment. Learn why ABG stock is a Buy.
